query: SELECT id, atletaId, tipo, url FROM midias WHERE atletaId IN (1650013) AND tipo = 'video';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xkKgzjDtwmdn7p.root --database 7XTarzVUuQNAxDd5Eu29wi --execute SELECT id, atletaId, tipo, url FROM midias WHERE atletaId IN (1650013) AND tipo = 'video';
